== Notes for [[Item:Q106604|Q106604]] ==

Progenitor of ''Shumaytiyya (Sumaytiyya)'' sect

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death): 203 AH (818 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muhammad_ibn_Ja'far_al-Sadiq_(Al-Dibaj)

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muhammad_ibn_Ja%27far_al-Sadiq_(Al-Dibaj)

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:4168498692000072713

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
